title: fix: lowercase cgroup

comments.body: [NON-BLOCKING] Packit jobs failed. @containers/packit-build please check. Everyone else, feel free to ignore.

Excellent spot and fix!
TYVM @Webb321 !

LGTM

Good catch, for context [1]:
> “cgroup” stands for “control group” and is never capitalized. The singular form is used to designate the whole feature and also as a qualifier as in “cgroup controllers”. When explicitly referring to multiple individual control groups, the plural form “cgroups” is used.

[1] https://docs.kernel.org/admin-guide/cgroup-v2.html#terminology
@Webb321 Please rebase onto the latest `main` from upstream, clean up the commit history, and add `Fixes: #27089` to the commit message.
